name: easy-setup-webhook-production
description: Add a secure deploy webhook endpoint to any Laravel or Node.js (Express + PM2) backend + frontend (React, Next.js, Vue, etc.) project. Use when asked to 'add deploy webhook', 'deploy endpoint', 'auto deploy', 'setup PM2 deploy', 'webhook para deployar', or similar. Implements git pull + conditional builds with security (throttle, ban, token validation) and battle-tested gotchas.
author: maxirodr
